en.description: Sirius is the brightest star in Earth night sky, located in Canis Major constellation.
facts: Binary star system with white dwarf companion

id.description: Sirius adalah bintang paling terang di langit malam Bumi, terletak di konstelasi Canis Major.
facts: Bintang paling terang di langit malam
Sistem bintang biner dengan pendamping katai putih

en.description: Canopus is the second-brightest star, a bright giant in constellation Carina.
facts: 13,300 times more luminous than the Sun

id.description: Canopus adalah bintang paling terang kedua, raksasa terang di konstelasi Carina.
facts: Bintang paling terang kedua di langit malam
Digunakan untuk navigasi pesawat ruang angkasa

en.description: Arcturus is the brightest star in the northern celestial hemisphere, located in Boötes.
facts: 170 times more luminous than the Sun

id.description: Arcturus adalah bintang paling terang di belahan langit utara, terletak di Boötes.
facts: Bintang paling terang keempat di langit malam

en.description: Vega is the brightest star in Lyra, was the north pole star 12,000 years ago.

id.description: Vega adalah bintang paling terang di Lyra, merupakan bintang kutub utara 12.000 tahun lalu.
facts: Bintang paling terang kelima di langit malam

en.description: Rigel is a blue supergiant in Orion, marking the hunter left foot.
facts: 120,000 times more luminous than the Sun

id.description: Rigel adalah supergiant biru di Orion, menandai kaki kiri pemburu.
facts: Bintang paling terang ketujuh di langit malam

en.description: Betelgeuse is a red supergiant in Orion, one of the largest stars visible to naked eye.
facts: Red supergiant near end of life
Diameter 700 times larger than the Sun

id.description: Betelgeuse adalah supergiant merah di Orion, salah satu bintang terbesar yang terlihat mata telanjang.
facts: Diameter 700 kali lebih besar dari Matahari
Akan meledak sebagai supernova suatu hari

en.description: Procyon is the brightest star in Canis Minor, part of the Winter Triangle.
facts: Forms Winter Triangle with Sirius and Betelgeuse

id.description: Procyon adalah bintang paling terang di Canis Minor, bagian dari Segitiga Musim Dingin.
facts: Bintang paling terang kedelapan di langit malam
Membentuk Segitiga Musim Dingin dengan Sirius dan Betelgeuse

en.description: Altair is the brightest star in Aquila, rotates extremely rapidly.

id.description: Altair adalah bintang paling terang di Aquila, berputar sangat cepat.
facts: Bintang paling terang kedua belas di langit malam

en.description: Aldebaran is an orange giant in Taurus, marking the eye of the bull.

id.description: Aldebaran adalah raksasa oranye di Taurus, menandai mata banteng.
facts: Bintang paling terang keempat belas di langit malam

en.description: Antares is a red supergiant in Scorpius, its name means rival of Mars.
facts: Diameter 700 times larger than the Sun

id.description: Antares adalah supergiant merah di Scorpius, namanya berarti saingan Mars.
facts: Bintang paling terang kelima belas di langit malam
Diameter 700 kali lebih besar dari Matahari

en.description: Bellatrix is a blue giant star in Orion, marking the left shoulder of the hunter.

id.description: Bellatrix adalah bintang raksasa biru di Orion, menandai bahu kiri pemburu.

en.description: Alnitak is the easternmost star of Orion's Belt, a triple star system near the Horsehead Nebula.

id.description: Alnitak adalah bintang paling timur dari Sabuk Orion, sistem bintang tiga dekat Nebula Horsehead.
facts: Bintang paling timur dari Sabuk Orion

en.description: Alnilam is the central star of Orion's Belt, a blue supergiant and one of the most luminous stars known.
facts: 375,000 times more luminous than the Sun

id.description: Alnilam adalah bintang tengah Sabuk Orion, supergiant biru dan salah satu bintang paling terang yang diketahui.

en.description: Mintaka is the westernmost star of Orion's Belt, lying very close to the celestial equator.

id.description: Mintaka adalah bintang paling barat dari Sabuk Orion, terletak sangat dekat dengan ekuator langit.
facts: Bintang paling barat dari Sabuk Orion

en.description: Shaula marks the stinger of Scorpius the Scorpion, located at the end of the scorpion's curved tail.

id.description: Shaula menandai sengat Kalajengking Scorpius, terletak di ujung ekor melengkung kalajengking.

en.description: Sargas is a bright star in the tail of Scorpius, forming part of the scorpion's distinctive curved shape.

id.description: Sargas adalah bintang terang di ekor Scorpius, membentuk bagian dari bentuk melengkung khas kalajengking.

en.description: Dschubba marks the head of Scorpius, positioned between the claws and the heart star Antares.

id.description: Dschubba menandai kepala Scorpius, terletak antara cakar dan bintang jantung Antares.

en.description: Graffias represents one of the claws of Scorpius, located at the northern part of the constellation.

id.description: Graffias melambangkan salah satu cakar Scorpius, terletak di bagian utara konstelasi.

en.description: Sheliak is the second-brightest star in Lyra, forming part of the lyre's frame with Vega.

id.description: Sheliak adalah bintang paling terang kedua di Lyra, membentuk bagian rangka kecapi bersama Vega.

en.description: Sulafat is a bright star in Lyra, completing the distinctive parallelogram shape of the constellation.

id.description: Sulafat adalah bintang terang di Lyra, melengkapi bentuk jajaran genjang khas konstelasi ini.

en.description: Delta Lyrae is a red giant star in Lyra, completing the lyre's distinctive shape alongside Vega.

id.description: Delta Lyrae adalah bintang raksasa merah di Lyra, melengkapi bentuk khas kecapi bersama Vega.
facts: Lebih dingin dari bintang Lyra lain

en.description: Mirzam is a blue giant star in Canis Major, serving as a beta star despite being less bright than Sirius.
facts: Beta star of Canis Major constellation
Blue giant star with variable brightness

id.description: Mirzam adalah bintang raksasa biru di Canis Major, berfungsi sebagai bintang beta meskipun kurang terang dari Sirius.
facts: Bintang raksasa biru dengan kecerahan variabel

en.description: Wezen is a yellow-white supergiant in Canis Major, one of the most distant bright stars visible to the naked eye.
facts: One of the most distant bright stars

id.description: Wezen adalah supergiant kuning-putih di Canis Major, salah satu bintang terang paling jauh yang terlihat mata telanjang.
facts: Salah satu bintang terang paling jauh

en.description: Adhara is a blue giant star in Canis Major, historically one of the brightest stars in the sky.

id.description: Adhara adalah bintang raksasa biru di Canis Major, secara historis salah satu bintang paling terang di langit.
facts: Bintang paling terang kedua di Canis Major
Nama berarti 'para gadis' dalam bahasa Arab

en.description: Furud is a blue main-sequence star in Canis Major, located in the southern part of the constellation.
facts: Southernmost bright star in Canis Major
Name means 'the solitary one' in Arabic

id.description: Furud adalah bintang deret utama biru di Canis Major, terletak di bagian selatan konstelasi.
facts: Bintang terang paling selatan di Canis Major
Nama berarti 'yang sendirian' dalam bahasa Arab

en.description: Gomeisa is a blue main-sequence star in Canis Minor, the second-brightest star in the small constellation.
facts: Blue main-sequence star with emission lines
Name means 'the little bleary-eyed one' in Arabic

id.description: Gomeisa adalah bintang deret utama biru di Canis Minor, bintang paling terang kedua di konstelasi kecil ini.
facts: Bintang paling terang kedua di Canis Minor
Bintang deret utama biru dengan garis emisi
Nama berarti 'yang bermata kabur kecil' dalam bahasa Arab

en.description: Tarazed is an orange giant star in Aquila, located north of Altair forming part of the eagle's shape.

id.description: Tarazed adalah bintang raksasa oranye di Aquila, terletak di utara Altair membentuk bagian bentuk elang.

en.description: Alshain is a yellow subgiant star in Aquila, located south of Altair completing the eagle's distinctive line.
facts: Name derived from Persian for 'the star'

id.description: Alshain adalah bintang subgiant kuning di Aquila, terletak di selatan Altair melengkapi garis khas elang.

en.description: Izar is a striking double star in Boötes, featuring a blue giant paired with an orange companion.

id.description: Izar adalah bintang ganda mencolok di Boötes, menampilkan raksasa biru berpasangan dengan pendamping oranye.
facts: Nama berarti 'ikat pinggang' dalam bahasa Arab

en.description: Muphrid is a yellow subgiant star in Boötes, located close to Arcturus in the herdsman's constellation.
facts: Name means 'the solitary one of the spear bearer' in Arabic

id.description: Muphrid adalah bintang subgiant kuning di Boötes, terletak dekat Arcturus di rasi gembala.
facts: Nama berarti 'yang sendirian dari pembawa tombak' dalam bahasa Arab

en.description: Seginus is a white giant star in Boötes, marking the left shoulder of the herdsman figure.
facts: Name derived from Arabic for 'the shoulder'

id.description: Seginus adalah bintang raksasa putih di Boötes, menandai bahu kiri figur gembala.
facts: Nama berasal dari bahasa Arab untuk 'bahu'

en.description: Elnath is a blue giant star in Taurus, marking the northern horn tip of the bull.
facts: Marks the bull's northern horn tip

id.description: Elnath adalah bintang raksasa biru di Taurus, menandai ujung tanduk utara banteng.

en.description: Ain is an orange giant star in Taurus, marking the eye of the bull alongside Aldebaran in the Hyades cluster.
facts: Orange giant star in the Hyades cluster

id.description: Ain adalah bintang raksasa oranye di Taurus, menandai mata banteng bersama Aldebaran di gugus Hyades.
facts: Bintang raksasa oranye di gugus Hyades

en.description: Hyadum is a yellow giant star in Taurus, the leading star of the V-shaped Hyades star cluster.
facts: Leading star of the Hyades cluster
Name means 'the first of the Hyades' in Arabic

id.description: Hyadum adalah bintang raksasa kuning di Taurus, bintang utama gugus bintang Hyades berbentuk V.
facts: Nama berarti 'pertama dari Hyades' dalam bahasa Arab

en.description: Avior is an orange giant star in Carina, one of the brightest stars in the southern sky.
facts: One of the brightest stars in southern sky

id.description: Avior adalah bintang raksasa oranye di Carina, salah satu bintang paling terang di langit selatan.
facts: Salah satu bintang paling terang di langit selatan

en.description: Miaplacidus is a white subgiant star in Carina, the second-brightest star in the constellation.
facts: Name combines Latin and Arabic origins

id.description: Miaplacidus adalah bintang subgiant putih di Carina, bintang paling terang kedua di konstelasi ini.
facts: Bintang paling terang kedua di Carina
Nama menggabungkan asal Latin dan Arab
